div.class: carousel-item o_colored_level pb184 pt176 oe_img_bg o_bg_img_center active
row content no-gutters align-items-center s_col_no_bgcolor s_nb_column_fixed
tp-editor-bg-color-n-shadow order-2 order-lg-1 jumbotron rounded px-4 offset-lg-1 pt24 pb24 o_colored_level o_visible col-lg-5 o_animate o_anim_fade_in

span.font: We are producing outerwear without frills. Functional, stylish and above all so durable to survive our way of free riding. We want
products we do not need to worry about.

i.class: fa rounded-circle mr-4 bg-o-color-1 text-o-color-3 fa-group rounded-circle mr-4 bg-o-color-1 text-o-color-3

div.p: Penguin is an independent rider owned business

i.class: fa rounded-circle mr-4 bg-o-color-1 text-o-color-3 fa-heart

div.p: Dedicated to freeriding since the beginning in 2002

i.class: fa rounded-circle mr-4 bg-o-color-1 text-o-color-3 fa-magic

div.p: Developed and tested for the use in the mountains.

div.class: col-12 p-1 o_animate o_anim_fade_in o_visible col-lg-6 pb0 pt0
tp-banner-content tp-editor-bg-color-n-shadow text-center w-50 o_colored_level tp-gradient-animation rounded o_cc o_cc1 bg-black-25

div.font: New colours availble. Classics back in stock.

a.class: mt-3 o_animate o_anim_fade_in o_visible btn btn-primary

div.class: col-lg-12 p-1 o_animate o_anim_fade_in o_visible pb0
tp-banner-content tp-editor-bg-color-n-shadow text-center w-50 o_colored_level rounded o_cc o_cc1 bg-black-25

div.font: Find new colours for this winter.

a.class: mt-3 o_animate o_anim_fade_in o_visible btn btn-primary

parallax s_parallax_is_fixed s_parallax_no_overflow_hidden px-4 o_colored_level pt256 pb256 oe_img_bg o_bg_img_center

h3.font: Visit our home base in Zurich

div.class: col-12 col-lg-4 o_visible pt0 o_animated o_animating
d-flex flex-column h-100 justify-content-center oe_custom_bg tp-editor-bg-both o_colored_level oe_img_bg o_bg_img_center

p.font: Winter is short, set your priorities right

section.class: tp-dynamic-snippet dr_not_editable s_d_products_snippet_wrapper text-center o_colored_level pb96

div.class: col-6 mb-4 mb-lg-0 o_colored_level pb0 col-lg-3

span.style: color: rgb(40, 39, 39); font-size: 14px; font-weight: 300; background-color: rgb(245, 241, 238)

p.span: We believe in durability as a key driver for sustainability. Take care of your products to maximize your life cycle and reduce consumption.
